evals.prompt: I want to set up a welcome automation in SendPulse that sends an email first, then a web push notification if they don't open it, and then an SMS as a last resort. How do I build this?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step Automation 360 setup with multichannel flow: trigger on list subscription, email step, wait + condition check, push step, wait + condition, SMS step

assertions.name: automation_360
assertions.description: Must reference Automation 360 as the tool for building multichannel workflows

assertions.name: multichannel_steps
assertions.description: Must explain how to add email, web push, and SMS as separate steps in the flow with conditions/branching between them

assertions.name: condition_branching
assertions.description: Must describe using if/else conditions to check engagement (email opened?) before escalating to the next channel

evals.prompt: How do I build a WhatsApp chatbot in SendPulse that greets customers, shows a product menu, and hands off to a human agent if they need help?
evals.expected_output: Guide covering WhatsApp Business API connection, chatbot flow building with greeting/menu/handoff, keyword triggers, and live chat transfer

assertions.name: whatsapp_api
assertions.description: Must mention that WhatsApp requires Business API connection and the 24-hour messaging window rule

assertions.name: flow_builder
assertions.description: Must describe using the visual chatbot flow builder with greeting, menu buttons, and branching responses

assertions.name: live_handoff
assertions.description: Must explain configuring live chat handoff for transferring from bot to human agent

evals.prompt: I'm building a custom app and need to send transactional emails and track delivery via the SendPulse API. Walk me through the setup.
evals.expected_output: Technical guide covering OAuth authentication, SMTP email endpoint, webhook setup for delivery tracking

assertions.name: authentication
assertions.description: Must explain OAuth 2.0 authentication with client_id/client_secret and the 1-hour token expiry requiring refresh logic

assertions.name: smtp_endpoint
assertions.description: Must describe the POST /smtp/emails endpoint with request format including to, from, subject, html fields

assertions.name: webhooks
assertions.description: Must recommend setting up webhooks for delivery/bounce/open tracking events
